findings.title: BeyondTrust RS/PRA Command Injection — Ransomware Confirmed
findings.affected_technology: BeyondTrust Remote Support (RS) & Privileged Remote Access (PRA)
findings.summary: CISA confirms ransomware exploitation; Unit 42 details web shells, C2, lateral movement across financial, legal, tech, healthcare sectors in US, France, Germany, Australia, Canada.

findings.title: Microsoft Patch Tuesday — 6 Zero-Days Under Active Exploitation
findings.affected_technology: Windows (all supported versions), Word, RDS, DWM, RRAS
findings.summary: Six actively exploited zero-days in February Patch Tuesday; CVE-2026-21510 is single-click Windows Shell bypass affecting all versions.

findings.title: Starkiller PhaaS — Real-Time MFA Bypass via Reverse Proxy
findings.summary: Phishing-as-a-service platform uses headless Chrome in Docker as MITM reverse proxy to capture credentials and session tokens in real-time, defeating MFA.

findings.title: AISLE AI Discovers All 12 OpenSSL Zero-Days
findings.summary: AI system found all 12 OpenSSL zero-days in January 2026 release including bugs present since 1998; unprecedented concentration from a single research entity.

findings.title: Kimwolf Botnet Sybil Attack Disrupts I2P Network
findings.summary: 700K botnet nodes accidentally disrupted I2P network in Sybil attack while using it for C2 fallback; network degraded since Feb 3.

noted.summary: 1.2M bank accounts exposed via unauthorized access.
SSNs exposed via loan application software error for ~6 months.
Japanese chip testing giant hit by ransomware.
All clinics closed statewide after ransomware attack.
Extortion group escalating with swatting, harassment, DDoS alongside data theft.
